records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew! I think I've seen most of it now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew! I think I've seen most of it now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew! I think I've seen most of it now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I think the monsters turned out pretty nice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I think the monsters turned out pretty nice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I think the monsters turned out pretty nice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... ya sure these monsters are okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... ya sure these monsters are okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... ya sure these monsters are okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know it's a program, but I've seen no monster this passive before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know it's a program, but I've seen no monster this passive before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know it's a program, but I've seen no monster this passive before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Farming... content.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Farming... content.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Farming... content.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Raising captured monsters as pets...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Raising captured monsters as pets...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Raising captured monsters as pets...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! So you're telling me that I can take them with me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! So you're telling me that I can take them with me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! So you're telling me that I can take them with me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, what I meant is... the game's really serious...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, what I meant is... the game's really serious...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, what I meant is... the game's really serious...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If ya don't like it, just say so. Bora, you said that you have the authority to make changes, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If ya don't like it, just say so. Bora, you said that you have the authority to make changes, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If ya don't like it, just say so. Bora, you said that you have the authority to make changes, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And Dain, you're the chairwoman of the Academy, which is a huge deal! So just tell 'em what you think!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And Dain, you're the chairwoman of the Academy, which is a huge deal! So just tell 'em what you think!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And Dain, you're the chairwoman of the Academy, which is a huge deal! So just tell 'em what you think!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's an abuse of power, Rinae.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's an abuse of power, Rinae.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's an abuse of power, Rinae.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a collaborative effort, so we can't just change everything to our liking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a collaborative effort, so we can't just change everything to our liking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a collaborative effort, so we can't just change everything to our liking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only company that has this technology is Bora's.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only company that has this technology is Bora's.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only company that has this technology is Bora's.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... Guess bein' an adult isn't all great, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... Guess bein' an adult isn't all great, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... Guess bein' an adult isn't all great, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rinae? I have a question...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rinae? I have a question...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rinae? I have a question...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Are you... still searching for it?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Are you... still searching for it?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Are you... still searching for it?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha, it's the same old. 'Cause it's for <color=#ffd34c>Teach</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha, it's the same old. 'Cause it's for <color=#ffd34c>Teach</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha, it's the same old. 'Cause it's for <color=#ffd34c>Teach</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, don't worry 'about it. It's different from back then. There's nothin' dangerous 'bout it.94p94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, don't worry 'about it. It's different from back then. There's nothin' dangerous 'bout it.94p94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, don't worry 'about it. It's different from back then. There's nothin' dangerous 'bout it.94p94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it does worry me. You always suddenly disappear and answer back so late...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it does worry me. You always suddenly disappear and answer back so late...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it does worry me. You always suddenly disappear and answer back so late...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't be leavin' anytime soon, so you should focus on what you're doin' right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't be leavin' anytime soon, so you should focus on what you're doin' right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't be leavin' anytime soon, so you should focus on what you're doin' right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Girls.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Girls.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Girls.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ya know what's the most important thing to me right now? <color=#ffd34c>It's y'all</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ya know what's the most important thing to me right now? <color=#ffd34c>It's y'all</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ya know what's the most important thing to me right now? <color=#ffd34c>It's y'all</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So now, whatever happens... I'm always on your side.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So now, whatever happens... I'm always on your side.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So now, whatever happens... I'm always on your side.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So at least for now... let's just have some fun. Ain't that right...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So at least for now... let's just have some fun. Ain't that right...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So at least for now... let's just have some fun. Ain't that right...?
